modules.name: Mini Painting Handle
highlights: Simple mini painting handle with a few extras. Batch painting friendly.
Threaded 2-piece handle with a hollow cavity for adding weight.
Adding weight (optional) increases stability significantly with heavier models.
Optional magnets on both ends interface with different model toppers, trays, and docks.

modules.name: Mini Painting Toppers
highlights: Toppers are designed to attach magnetically to the top of the mini painting handle.
Models can be secured to toppers with poster putty, hot glue (my favorite), museum wax, etc.
Preset holes can be drilled out to desired sizes for pinning models directly to the topper.
Multiple sizes and styles, rounds are optimized to print faster.

modules.name: Mini Painting Handle Docks and Trays
highlights: A collection of models designed to hold painting handles and toppers securely when not in use.
Docks and Trays (Docks with built-in carrying handles) available in multiple sizes.
Keep models organized and protected while painting.
Allows for efficient workflows that scale up with your project.
Every model can get its own topper while the painter swaps toppers onto a single handle.
Every model can get a full topper + handle setup, letting the painter swap models easily with one hand.

modules.name: Bike Grip Mini Painting Handle
highlights: Comfort-focused painting handle core designed to fit inside most bicycle handlebar grips.
Utilizes all the same toppers, trays, and docks as the standard mini painting handle.
Hollow design allows for adding weight.
Recommended for more advanced users who want to customize their handles.

modules.name: Ergonomic Brush Grip
highlights: 2-piece design with non-marring clamping collet.
Fits a wide range of brush handle sizes and shapes.
Larger grip surface area allows for more varied grips and better control - helps reduce hand strain.
Optional magnet for secure tip-down brush storage in racks.

modules.name: Ergonomic Brush Grip Rack
highlights: Safe tip-down storage for brushes clamped inside of ergonomic brush grips.
Freestanding and wall mountable variants.
Good for drying expensive brushes after cleaning.

modules.name: All in One Paint Rack
highlights: Tiered paint rack that holds most popular miniature painting size classes in one rack.
Seamless left-right connections with rack connector piece.
Utilize with module risers to scale depth if desired.
Holds Citadel, Pro Acryl, AK, Vallejo, Army Painter, Golden, Scale 75, and many more!

modules.name: Basic Brush Rack
highlights: Simple 16mm hex patterned tip-up brush storage rack.
Compact and secure way to store bulk brushes or drybrushes.
Removable aligned lid, optionally magnetized with 6x2mm magnets.
Optional height spacer(s) can be added to customize the height.

modules.name: Pro Acryl Expert Acrylics Paint Rack
highlights: Racks designed to hold Monument Hobbies Pro Acryl Expert Acrylics paint tubes.
Infinite vertical stacking with dovetail keyed connector piece.
Freestanding, Gridfinity, and wall mount variants in 2-tube and 4-tube widths.

modules.name: Drybrush Texture Pad Palette
highlights: A simple texture pad for unloading your brush when drybrushing.
The concentric rings create sections that allow you to use it as a dry palette in a pinch.

modules.name: Brush Rinse Station
highlights: Fully printable brush rinse station.
Divided wells for clean water.
Scrubbing surface for stubborn paint.
Waterproof verified for 5 days (I gave up after that) with PLA at provided print settings.
PETG recommended for long-term use.

modules.name: Blue Brush Rinse Station Dock
highlights: Secure dock designed for the common square blue brush rinse tub you probably already have.
Provides a secure way to keep it from sliding around.
Much bigger than the 3D printed version.

modules.name: Meeden Dry Palette Dock
highlights: Dock for the Meeden 7 well ceramic dry palette.
Textured nubs for drybrush testing/unloading a brush.
Can be used without the ceramic palette if you don't have one.

modules.name: Ink Drybrush Pad Dock
highlights: Docks with an 81mm circular cutout.
Securely holds "TailaiMei Makeup Brush Color Remover" tins (buy one for drybrushing and thank me later).
I also use it to hold "Jucoan Ceramic Watercolor Palettes" for thinning inks and washes I don't want on my wet palette.

modules.name: Module Storage Riser
highlights: Magnetic storage risers that add extra height and usable storage to Gridfinity arrays.
Keyed alignment notches add stability when used in multiple orientations.
Large version is long enough to store extra brushes in.
